Enhanced Protection



This film not only protects your car's screen from scratches and smudges but also shields it from harmful UV rays, keeping your screen in top condition.






Customized Design



The specialized 25 models of BYD Yuan UP navigation film are designed to perfectly fit your car's dashboard, offering a seamless integration with your vehicle's interior.






Aesthetic Appeal



With its sleek design, this film adds an aesthetic appeal to your car's interior, making it look more sophisticated and modern.






Easy Installation



The film is easy to install, making it a convenient choice for car owners who want to enhance their car's interior without professional help.






High-Quality Material



Made from tempered glass, this film provides superior protection to your car's instrument panel and control screen, ensuring durability and longevity.

For Mercedes Benz Original Style 1din MP3 Radio

1. Radio (FM).
2. Supports USB flash drive (audio).
3. AUX function.
4. Bluetooth function.
5. RCA audio output can be connected to a subwoofer.
6. Supports USB output.

Installation Effect

How to turn on the radio?

①Please make sure connect positive pole with RED/YELLOW wire.
②Connect negative pole with BLACK wire.

Reverse connection of positive/negative poles may cause the damageof fuse.
If so, please replace with a new fuse then connect wires again.

Are You still Troubled By The Following issues?

This radio support Bluetooth music and phone call.

Support FM Radio

Support Bluetooth hands-free calling,built-in microphone, Bluetooth calls more clear , free your hands.

Play Music

Support radio FM and AUX input and Bluetoothas well as inserting a UsB flash drive to play music.

Excellent Sound Effects

Preset EQ and left&right Amplifier lets the music flow in this 200W(4x50W) auto radio. You can control the bass, treble, balance and more.

Time Display

It is convenilent and safe to check the time while driving.

Audio Play Modes & Quick Charge

Dual USB for simultaneous charging and USB reader, Aux-in let you easy to find a way to play.

Product Detail

Please note

The two machinechassis models have different lengthsand will be shipped randomly.

Product Size

Packing List

 

How to Connect and Use DAB?

The USB cable for the external DAB+ box needs to be shielded.

Full Band Search

This DAB is equipped with the function of searching for radio stations in all frequency bands, which can accurately cover all kinds of frequency bands and fully satisfy your diversified listening needs.

(NOTE: Short press this button to search the station)

Better Sound

*DAB Band receiver
* USB interface
* Support MP3 system
*Full-band channel search
*LED light signal status indication

Operating Temperature Range

Installation

Note:Before installation, please remove the protective paper from the DAB ANTENNA. The copper part must be connected with Metal(ground electrode).
